convert-pdf-to-docx-preserve-layout.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Layout Preservation
convert-pdf-to-docx-preserve-layout.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to convert a PDF file to DOCX while preserving the original layout using the standard recognition mode.

convert-pdf-to-docx-enhanced-recognition.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Enhanced Table and Graphic Recognition
convert-pdf-to-docx-enhanced-recognition.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF file to a DOCX document using Aspose.Pdf with the enhanced flow recognition mode to better preserve complex tables and graphics.

convert-pdf-to-doc.title: Convert PDF to DOC with Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-doc.description: Shows how to load a PDF file and save it as a DOC document using Aspose.Pdf with default text recognition settings.

convert-pdf-to-doc-image-extraction.title: Convert PDF to DOC with Image Extraction Using Custom Recognition Mode
convert-pdf-to-doc-image-extraction.description: Shows how to convert a PDF file to a DOC document while extracting only images by using Aspose.Pdf's DocSaveOptions with Textbox recognition mode.

convert-pdf-to-docx-auto-detection.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Automatic Content Detection
convert-pdf-to-docx-auto-detection.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and save it as a DOCX file with DocSaveOptions set to automatic content detection (Flow mode).

convert-pdf-to-doc-plain-text.title: Convert PDF to DOC with Plain Text Extraction
convert-pdf-to-doc-plain-text.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF file and save it as a DOC document while extracting only plain text using Aspose.Pdf's DocSaveOptions with Textbox recognition mode.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-metadata.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Custom Metadata
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-metadata.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to DOCX using Aspose.Pdf while setting custom metadata properties such as author and title.

convert-pdf-to-docx-preserve-footnotes.title: Convert PDF to DOCX while Preserving Footnotes
convert-pdf-to-docx-preserve-footnotes.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, configure DocSaveOptions for DOCX output, and save the document, preserving footnotes via enhanced recognition mode.

convert-pdf-to-docx-extract-images.title: Convert PDF to DOCX and Extract Embedded Images
convert-pdf-to-docx-extract-images.description: Loads a PDF, converts it to a DOCX file using Aspose.Pdf, then iterates through each page to extract all embedded images and saves them to a designated folder.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-report.title: Convert PDF to DOCX and Generate Conversion Report
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-report.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF file to DOCX using Aspose.Pdf, measure conversion time, collect file size and page count, and output a JSON report with the statistics.

convert-pdf-to-docx-and-zip.title: Convert PDF to DOCX and Zip the Result
convert-pdf-to-docx-and-zip.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to a DOCX document using Aspose.Pdf and then compressing the generated DOCX into a ZIP archive for storage.

pdf-to-docx-to-pdfa-conversion.title: Convert PDF to DOCX and then to PDF/A
pdf-to-docx-to-pdfa-conversion.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to convert a PDF file to DOCX format and subsequently create a PDF/A‑1B compliant document from the DOCX output.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-hyphenation.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Language‑Specific Hyphenation
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-hyphenation.description: Shows how to load a PDF, set its language to influence hyphenation, configure DOCX conversion options, and save the result as a DOCX file using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-table-of-figure.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Table of Figures
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-table-of-figure.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, extracting its images to build a Table of Figures, inserting the table into the document, and saving the result as a DOCX file using Aspose.PDF.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-embedded-custom.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Embedded Custom Font
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-embedded-custom.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to DOCX using Aspose.Pdf while registering a custom TrueType font so that the font is embedded in the generated DOCX file.

convert-pdf-to-pptx.title: Convert PDF to PPTX
convert-pdf-to-pptx.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to an editable PowerPoint (PPTX) presentation using Aspose.Pdf with default save options.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-slides-as-images.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Slides as Images
convert-pdf-to-pptx-slides-as-images.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to a PPTX presentation using Aspose.Pdf, with each slide rendered as a raster image by enabling the SlidesAsImages option.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-progress-handle.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Custom Progress Handler
convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-progress-handle.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf while attaching a custom progress handler to monitor conversion status.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-progress.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Custom Progress Handler
convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-progress.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf and attaching a custom progress handler to log conversion events.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-slidesasimages-dpi.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with SlidesAsImages and Custom DPI
convert-pdf-to-pptx-slidesasimages-dpi.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to a PPTX presentation using Aspose.Pdf, rendering each page as a single image and specifying a high‑resolution DPI for the images.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-and-compress.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Compress the Resulting File
convert-pdf-to-pptx-and-compress.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to a PPTX presentation using Aspose.Pdf and then recompressing the PPTX (a ZIP archive) with optimal compression for smaller distribution size.

convert-pdf-to-pptx__v2.title: Convert PDF to PPTX
convert-pdf-to-pptx__v2.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to a PPTX presentation using Aspose.Pdf's Document.Save method.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-to-pdfa.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and then to PDF/A
convert-pdf-to-pptx-to-pdfa.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF file to a PPTX presentation using Aspose.Pdf, then load the PPTX and create a PDF/A‑1B archival version.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-pptx-slidesasimage.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PPTX with SlidesAsImages
batch-convert-pdfs-to-pptx-slidesasimage.description: Demonstrates how to convert multiple PDF files to PPTX format in a batch, using the SlidesAsImages option to rasterize each slide as an image.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-extract-annotations.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Extract Annotation Notes
convert-pdf-to-pptx-extract-annotations.description: The example loads a PDF, extracts text from its annotations per page, and then converts the document to a PPTX file using Aspose.Pdf. The extracted notes are stored in a dictionary for later use (e.g., adding speaker notes with Aspose.Slides).

convert-pdf-to-pptx-add-custom-propertie.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Add Custom Document Properties
convert-pdf-to-pptx-add-custom-propertie.description: The example loads a PDF, sets both standard and custom document properties, and then converts the file to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-embedded-font.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Embedded Custom Font
convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-embedded-font.description: Demonstrates embedding a custom font into a PDF and then converting that PDF to a PPTX presentation using Aspose.Pdf, ensuring consistent font appearance.

convert-pdf-to-pptx__v3.title: Convert PDF to PowerPoint (PPTX) Using Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-pptx__v3.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to a PPTX presentation with Aspose.Pdf and explains that applying a custom slide master requires a separate PowerPoint library.

convert-pdf-to-pptx__v4.title: Convert PDF to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-pptx__v4.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to a PPTX presentation by loading the PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Document and saving it with the PPTX format.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-extract-slide-titles.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Extract Slide Titles to CSV
convert-pdf-to-pptx-extract-slide-titles.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to a PPTX presentation with Aspose.Pdf, then read the PPTX package to locate title placeholders on each slide and write the slide numbers and titles to a CSV file.

convert-pdf-to-pptx__v5.title: Convert PDF to PowerPoint (PPTX) with Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-pptx__v5.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to a PPTX presentation using Aspose.Pdf's Document class and the Save method with the PPTX format.

convert-pdf-to-single-page-html.title: Convert PDF to Single-Page HTML with Embedded Resources
convert-pdf-to-single-page-html.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to a single HTML file while embedding images, CSS, and fonts using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-html.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page HTML with SplitIntoPages
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-html.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, configuring HtmlSaveOptions to split each page into separate HTML files, and saving the result. Includes platform‑specific handling for GDI+ requirements.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg.title: Convert PDF to HTML with SVG Image Extraction
convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg.description: Shows how to convert a PDF file to HTML using Aspose.Pdf and store the generated SVG images in a designated folder.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg-compression.title: Convert PDF to HTML with SVG Compression
convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg-compression.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, configuring HtmlSaveOptions to compress SVG graphics, and saving the document as an HTML file.

convert-pdf-to-html-png-background.title: Convert PDF to HTML with PNG Page Backgrounds
convert-pdf-to-html-png-background.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to HTML using Aspose.Pdf while rendering all page background images as a single embedded PNG per page.

convert-pdf-pages-to-separate-html-files.title: Convert PDF Pages to Separate HTML Files
convert-pdf-pages-to-separate-html-files.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, configuring HtmlSaveOptions to split the document into pages, and saving each page as an individual HTML file.

pdf-to-html-with-toc.title: Convert PDF to HTML and Insert a Table of Contents
pdf-to-html-with-toc.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to a single self‑contained HTML document using Aspose.Pdf, extracting heading elements from the PDF's tagged structure, and inserting a generated table of contents into the HTML output.

convert-pdf-to-html-per-page-image-folde.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Per-Page Image Subfolders
convert-pdf-to-html-per-page-image-folde.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to HTML using Aspose.Pdf and store each page's images in separate subfolders by implementing a custom resource‑saving strategy.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg-compression.title: Convert PDF to HTML with SVG Compression
convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg-compression.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to HTML using Aspose.Pdf while enabling SVG graphics compression to reduce the size of generated SVG assets.

convert-pdf-to-html-png-background__v2.title: Convert PDF to HTML with PNG Page Backgrounds
convert-pdf-to-html-png-background__v2.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to HTML using Aspose.Pdf while rendering each page's background as an embedded PNG image.

pdf-to-html-merge-and-reconvert.title: Convert PDF to HTML, Merge Pages, and Recreate PDF
pdf-to-html-merge-and-reconvert.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to per‑page HTML fragments, combining them into a single HTML document, and then converting the combined HTML back to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-html-zip.title: Convert PDF to HTML and Package into ZIP
convert-pdf-to-html-zip.description: Shows how to convert a PDF into separate HTML pages with external assets using Aspose.Pdf and then create a ZIP archive of the generated files for distribution.

convert-pdf-to-html-and-minify.title: Convert PDF to HTML and Minify Output
convert-pdf-to-html-and-minify.description: Shows how to convert a PDF into a single optimized HTML file using Aspose.Pdf and then minify the generated HTML by stripping comments and collapsing whitespace.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-custom-fonts.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Embedded Custom Fonts
convert-pdf-to-html-with-custom-fonts.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to HTML using Aspose.Pdf and embed a custom TrueType font via @font-face rules in the generated CSS.

convert-pdf-to-responsive-html.title: Convert PDF to Responsive HTML with Embedded CSS
convert-pdf-to-responsive-html.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to HTML using Aspose.Pdf with flow layout for better responsiveness, embedding images, and linking a responsive CSS stylesheet.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-custom-css.title: Convert PDF to HTML and Apply Custom CSS
convert-pdf-to-html-with-custom-css.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to a single HTML file using Aspose.Pdf and then injecting a link to a custom CSS stylesheet.

pdf-to-html-with-sitemap.title: Convert PDF to HTML and Generate Sitemap XML
pdf-to-html-with-sitemap.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to a single HTML file using Aspose.Pdf and creating a simple sitemap.xml that lists the generated HTML page for SEO.

add-logo-to-pdf-and-convert-to-pptx.title: Add Logo to PDF and Convert to PPTX
add-logo-to-pdf-and-convert-to-pptx.description: Shows how to stamp a company logo onto each page of a PDF using ImageStamp and then save the modified document directly as a PPTX file with Aspose.Pdf.

pdf-to-html-pages-with-index.title: Convert PDF to Separate HTML Pages with Index
pdf-to-html-pages-with-index.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into individual HTML files using Aspose.Pdf's HtmlSaveOptions with a custom saving strategy, and then generate an index.html that links to each page.

convert-pdf-to-html-docx-with-embedded-f.title: Convert PDF to HTML and DOCX with Embedded Custom Fonts
convert-pdf-to-html-docx-with-embedded-f.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to HTML and DOCX while embedding the original fonts to ensure consistent rendering across formats.

convert-pdf-to-html-pptx-with-embedded-f.title: Convert PDF to HTML and PPTX with Embedded Fonts
convert-pdf-to-html-pptx-with-embedded-f.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to HTML (embedding fonts as WOFF) and to PPTX while embedding custom fonts using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-bmp.title: Convert PDF Pages to BMP Images
convert-pdf-to-bmp.description: Shows how to load a PDF document and convert each page to a BMP image using Aspose.Pdf's BmpDevice with default settings.

convert-pdf-to-jpeg-images.title: Convert PDF to JPEG Images with Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-jpeg-images.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF document and render each page as a high‑quality JPEG image using Aspose.Pdf's JpegDevice.

convert-pdf-pages-to-gif.title: Convert PDF Pages to GIF Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-gif.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and use GifDevice to render each page as a separate GIF file using default parameters.

convert-pdf-to-png-with-transparent-back.title: Convert PDF to PNG Images with Transparent Background
convert-pdf-to-png-with-transparent-back.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, render each page to a PNG image at a specified DPI, and enable a transparent background for the output files.

convert-pdf-to-emf.title: Convert PDF Pages to EMF Images
convert-pdf-to-emf.description: Shows how to convert each page of a PDF document into separate EMF vector images using Aspose.Pdf's EmfDevice while preserving vector data.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.title: Convert PDF to Multi-Page TIFF
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, configure TIFF conversion settings, and generate a single multi-page TIFF file using TiffDevice.

convert-pdf-to-svg.title: Convert PDF to SVG Images
convert-pdf-to-svg.description: Shows how to load a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf and save each page as separate SVG files using default SvgSaveOptions.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff__v2.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff__v2.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf and convert all its pages into a single multi‑page TIFF file using the default TiffDevice settings.

convert-pdf-page-region-to-png.title: Convert PDF Page Region to PNG
convert-pdf-page-region-to-png.description: Shows how to define a rectangular region on a PDF page, set the CropBox to that region, and render the cropped area as a PNG image using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-page-to-jpeg.title: Convert PDF Page to JPEG Image
convert-pdf-page-to-jpeg.description: Shows how to load a PDF, select a specific page, and save it as a JPEG image using Aspose.Pdf's JpegDevice with the default DPI.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-png-preserving-fol.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PNG Preserving Folder Structure
batch-convert-pdfs-to-png-preserving-fol.description: Demonstrates how to recursively locate PDF files, convert each page to a PNG image using Aspose.Pdf, and save the images while preserving the original directory hierarchy.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-jpeg-with-custom-n.title: Batch Convert PDFs to JPEG Images with Custom Naming
batch-convert-pdfs-to-jpeg-with-custom-n.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of multiple PDF files in a folder to JPEG images using Aspose.Pdf, applying a custom file‑naming pattern for the output files.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-multi-page-tiff.title: Batch Convert PDFs to Multi‑Page TIFF
batch-convert-pdfs-to-multi-page-tiff.description: Demonstrates how to loop through a list of PDF files and convert each one into a multi‑page TIFF archive using Aspose.Pdf with default (no) compression.

validate-and-convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b.title: Validate and Convert PDF to PDF/A‑1b
validate-and-convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b.description: Shows how to validate a PDF against PDF/A‑1b, write the validation log, and convert the document to PDF/A‑1b using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-3b-with-font-substit.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑3b with Font Substitution
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-3b-with-font-substit.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to PDF/A‑3b compliance using Aspose.Pdf, enabling default font substitution for missing fonts, and saving the resulting file.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa4-with-auto-tagging.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑4 with Auto‑Tagging
convert-pdf-to-pdfa4-with-auto-tagging.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to PDF/A‑4 compliance while enabling automatic tagging using Aspose.Pdf conversion options.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b-skip-errors.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b with Skip on Errors
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b-skip-errors.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF to PDF/A‑1b using Aspose.Pdf while setting ConvertErrorAction to skip non‑convertible elements, and logs the conversion process.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-3b-throw-errors.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-3b with Exception on Errors
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-3b-throw-errors.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to PDF/A‑3b using Aspose.Pdf while configuring the conversion to throw exceptions on errors and handling those exceptions.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa4-with-convert-error-.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑4 with ConvertErrorAction
convert-pdf-to-pdfa4-with-convert-error-.description: Loads a PDF, configures PdfFormatConversionOptions with a ConvertErrorAction to attempt conversion of problematic elements, converts the document to PDF/A‑4, and saves the result with a conversion log.

add-attachment-and-convert-to-pdfa3b.title: Add External File Attachment and Convert to PDF/A‑3b
add-attachment-and-convert-to-pdfa3b.description: Demonstrates how to embed an external text file into a PDF, optionally add a visible file‑attachment annotation, and then convert the document to PDF/A‑3b compliance using Aspose.Pdf.

add-xml-attachment-to-pdfa1b.title: Add XML Attachment to PDF/A-1b Document
add-xml-attachment-to-pdfa1b.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to PDF/A‑1b and attaching an external XML file as a file attachment annotation.

replace-missing-fonts-pdfa-conversion.title: Replace Missing Fonts During PDF/A Conversion with Font Substitution
replace-missing-fonts-pdfa-conversion.description: Shows how to add font substitution fallback rules and convert a PDF to PDF/A format using Aspose.Pdf in C#.

enable-auto-tagging-pdfa-conversion.title: Enable Auto‑Tagging for PDF/A Conversion
enable-auto-tagging-pdfa-conversion.description: Demonstrates how to enable automatic tagging when converting a PDF to PDF/A‑1B using Aspose.Pdf, including logging and saving the resulting document.

convert-epub-to-pdf-custom-page-size.title: Convert EPUB to PDF with Custom Page Size
convert-epub-to-pdf-custom-page-size.description: Demonstrates loading an EPUB file using EpubLoadOptions with a custom page size and saving it as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-markdown-to-pdf.title: Convert Markdown to PDF with Code Block Preservation
convert-markdown-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a Markdown file using MdLoadOptions and converting it to a PDF document while preserving code blocks, then saving the result.

convert-pcl-to-pdf-hpgl2.title: Convert PCL to PDF with HP‑GL/2 Support
convert-pcl-to-pdf-hpgl2.description: Demonstrates loading a PCL file (including HP‑GL/2 vectors) using Aspose.Pdf and saving it directly as a PDF document.

convert-postscript-to-pdf.title: Convert PostScript to PDF with Aspose.Pdf
convert-postscript-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PostScript (.ps) file using Aspose.Pdf's PsLoadOptions and converting it to a PDF document with default settings.

convert-xml-to-pdf-using-xsl-fo.title: Convert XML to PDF using XSL‑FO with Aspose.Pdf
convert-xml-to-pdf-using-xsl-fo.description: Shows how to load an XML file, apply an XSL‑FO stylesheet via XmlLoadOptions, and save the transformed output as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-xslfo-to-pdf.title: Convert XSL‑FO to PDF using Aspose.Pdf
convert-xslfo-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an XSL‑FO file with Aspose.Pdf and saving it as a PDF using the default conversion options.

convert-latex-to-pdf.title: Convert LaTeX to PDF with Aspose.Pdf
convert-latex-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a .tex file using TeXLoadOptions and convert it to a PDF while keeping equations as vector graphics.

convert-ofd-to-pdf.title: Convert OFD to PDF with Aspose.Pdf
convert-ofd-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an OFD document using OfdLoadOptions and saving it as a PDF with default settings using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-epub.title: Convert PDF to EPUB using Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-epub.description: Shows how to load a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf and save it as an EPUB using the default conversion settings.

pdf-to-epub-with-cover-image.title: PDF to EPUB Conversion with Custom Cover Image and Metadata
pdf-to-epub-with-cover-image.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to an EPUB using Aspose.Pdf, add a custom cover image as the first page, and set document metadata such as title, author, subject, and keywords.

convert-pdf-to-latex-with-output-directo.title: Convert PDF to LaTeX with Specified Output Directory
convert-pdf-to-latex-with-output-directo.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, configure TeXSaveOptions to set an output folder, and save the document as a LaTeX (.tex) file.

convert-pdf-to-latex-with-custom-macros.title: Convert PDF to LaTeX with Custom Macros
convert-pdf-to-latex-with-custom-macros.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to LaTeX (TeX) using Aspose.Pdf and prepend custom macro definitions to the generated .tex file.

extract-text-from-pdf-using-textdevice.title: Extract Text from PDF Using TextDevice
extract-text-from-pdf-using-textdevice.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF document and extract its textual content to a plain text file using Aspose.Pdf's TextDevice.

extract-pdf-text-to-utf8-file-preserving.title: Extract PDF Text to UTF-8 File Preserving Line Breaks
extract-pdf-text-to-utf8-file-preserving.description: The example loads a PDF file, extracts its text using Aspose.Pdf's TextAbsorber with pure formatting to keep line breaks, and writes the result to a UTF-8 encoded text file.

extract-visible-text-from-pdf.title: Extract Visible Text from PDF using Aspose.Pdf
extract-visible-text-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF document and extract only the visible text (excluding hidden OCR layers) using Aspose.Pdf's TextAbsorber with pure formatting mode, then save it to a text file.

convert-pdf-to-xps.title: Convert PDF to XPS using XpsSaveOptions
convert-pdf-to-xps.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf and save it as an XPS document using the default XpsSaveOptions settings.

convert-pdf-to-xps-custom-page-size.title: Convert PDF to XPS with Custom Page Size
convert-pdf-to-xps-custom-page-size.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply a custom page size (e.g., A4 landscape) to each page, and save the document as an XPS file using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-markdown.title: Convert PDF to Markdown with Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-markdown.description: Shows how to load a PDF file and save it as a Markdown document using Aspose.Pdf's default MarkdownSaveOptions.

convert-pdf-to-markdown-with-custom-head.title: Convert PDF to Markdown with Custom Heading Mapping
convert-pdf-to-markdown-with-custom-head.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF file to Markdown using Aspose.Pdf while configuring heuristic heading recognition and a custom heading level threshold.

convert-pdf-to-mobixml.title: Convert PDF to MobiXml
convert-pdf-to-mobixml.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf and save it as a MobiXml document using the default MobiXmlSaveOptions.

convert-pdf-to-mobixml-with-custom-metad.title: Convert PDF to MobiXml with Custom Metadata
convert-pdf-to-mobixml-with-custom-metad.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to MobiXml format while setting standard and custom metadata such as author and publisher using Aspose.Pdf.

pdf-to-png-bradley-binarization.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG with Bradley Binarization
pdf-to-png-bradley-binarization.description: The example loads a PDF, renders each page to a PNG image, applies the Bradley binarization algorithm to enhance contrast, and saves the resulting PNG files.

convert-pdf-to-png-transparent-backgroun.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG with Transparent Background
convert-pdf-to-png-transparent-backgroun.description: Shows how to convert each page of a PDF document to PNG images while preserving transparency by enabling the TransparentBackground option of the PngDevice.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff__v3.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff__v3.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF document and using Aspose.Pdf's TiffDevice to generate a single multi‑page TIFF file with the default compression.

create-single-page-tiff-from-first-pdf-p.title: Create Single-Page TIFF from First PDF Page
create-single-page-tiff-from-first-pdf-p.description: The example loads a PDF, configures a custom resolution and TIFF settings, and uses Aspose.Pdf's TiffDevice to convert only the first page into a single-page TIFF file.

convert-pdf-to-svg__v2.title: Convert PDF to SVG with Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-svg__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, set SVG save options, and save the file as an SVG, enabling embedded style information.
